market_summary.Status: Asian markets rebounded on March 24, 2026, driven by cautious optimism over potential Middle East de-escalation after US-Iran talks.
market_summary.Performance: Nikkei 225 (+1.2%), Kospi (+2.2%), and Hang Seng (+1.5%) showed strong recovery from previous day's sharp losses.

art_highlights.detail: ABHK is in full swing, featuring 240 galleries. Taiwan-linked galleries are notable, presenting works ranging from historical modernism to contemporary social critiques.
Paris's Grand Palais opened a major Henri Matisse retrospective, 'Matisse, 1941–1954,' focusing on his late-career cut-outs.
The 25th Biennale of Sydney, 'Rememory,' continues to explore themes of memory and inheritance through active force.
